title: Astromech Bonds
description: Ever imagined having your own droid companion like R2-D2? This mod brings him to your world as a loyal helper
body:
![ASTROMECH BONDS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bdc3e74bd7e2e1fc4cce164cb5720420c68403c_0.webp)

Have you ever dreamed of having your own droid companion like R2-D2?
This mod adds R2-D2 as a fully vanilla-friendly droid companion, designed to blend naturally into the Minecraft world without breaking its visual style. Explore the desert, find Jawas, and trade with them. With a bit of luck, you might obtain a damaged R2-D2, which you can repair to turn him into your loyal companion on all your adventures.

![R2D2 WITH STEVE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00322bb96d7cedf905a3f334000bfb279188fecd.png)

## CUSTOMIZE IT YOUR WAY ## 
You can change R2-D2’s color using Minecraft dyes. The available colors are: pink, blue, black, gray, orange, green, yellow, and red.

![all droid colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39047ec08960e66e994a27e0abbbe318a7168902.gif)

## HOW TO OBTAIN R2-D2 ##
![JAWAS TRADING](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f1291764d74cdc8d58ae06d3dddeb15426dba4f.png)
1. To get your own R2-D2, you’ll need to interact with Jawas, who spawn naturally in desert biomes.
2. They trade in a similar way to Piglins, and their main interest is iron ingots.
3. Offer them iron, and you’ll receive random items in return. If you're lucky, they might give you a Damaged R2-D2 Unit.
4. Repair it with a Wrench to bring your new droid companion back to life.

![GECKOLIB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20593e7fa171a541f596bfe6f914d7fc7ec41acb.png)
